Poco M7 5G mobile was launched on 3rd March 2025. The phone comes with a 120 Hz refresh rate 6.88-inch touchscreen display offering a resolution of 720x1640 pixels (HD+). It comes with 6GB, 8GB of RAM. The Poco M7 5G runs Android 14 and is powered by a 5160mAh battery.As far as the cameras are concerned, the Poco M7 5G on the rear packs 50-megapixel camera. It has a single front camera setup for selfies, featuring an 8-megapixel sensor.

I'm this phone from past 1 year, my previous phone is samsung S22. I bought this phone as temporary after I lost my s22. Still tbe phone impressed me a lot with display and battery. Everything is good in this mobile.

Like most phones it's missing features that really it shouldn't be but I suspect a lot of people won't care about (no micro SD is unfortunate but 1TB + USB3 should be enough for photos, and needing an adapter for wired headphones is just sad) but it's also got some really cool features of its own. Notably being one of the few non iPhones with 3D face unlock and putting a 200MP sensor on the zoom where really it belongs.

Also really like how everyone's just dropping the glass back.
